innateAbility.name: Curiosity
innateAbility.description: Grants bonus base attack damage, flat bonus area-of-effect, bonus incoming buff duration amplification, and outgoing debuff duration amplification per stack.

abilities.name: Telekinesis
abilities.description: Lifts the unit-targeted enemy into the air briefly, then hurls them back at the ground.The affected unit lands on the ground with such force that it stuns other enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Telekinesis Land
abilities.description: Chooses the area-targeted location the affected unit will land when Telekinesis finishes, and stuns other enemy units within the radiusThe lifted unit is not stunned upon landing.

abilities.name: Fade Bolt
abilities.description: The projectile travels between enemy units, with each bounce instance deal lesser damage.

abilities.name: Arcane Supremacy
abilities.description: Rubick's mastery of the arcane allows him to have a larger cast range and increased potency.

abilities.name: Spell Steal
abilities.description: Rubick studies the trace magical essence of the affected enemy hero, learning the secrets of the last ability that it casts.

abilities.name: Stolen Spell 1
abilities.description: The acquired ability of Spell Steal will take this slot.

abilities.name: Stolen Spell 2
abilities.description: The acquired sub-abilities of Spell Steal will take this slot, unless explicitly stated.

talents.right: +12% Fade Bolt Attack Damage/Spell Damage Reduction
x0.4 Stolen Spells Mana Cost Factor
